---
date: 2026/04/01
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
sidebar: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
listing:
  - id: team-news
    contents: "../Activities/news/*.qmd"
    include:
      categories: "cuni"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
    max-description-length: 300
    fields: [title, description, date]
    page-size: 3
---

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}

{{< include _cuni-en.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}

{{< include _cuni-de.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="french"}

{{< include _cuni-fr.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="czech"}

{{< include _cuni-cs.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="norwegian"}

{{< include _cuni-no.qmd >}}

:::::

### News

::: {#team-news}
:::
